content: I will apply the change to the info box rounding on line 3461 using the exact indentation.

args.Description: "Change info box rounded corners to 5px in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change the info box container in step 3 from rounded-[1.5rem] to rounded-[5px] in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.ReplacementContent: "                          <div className=\"bg-indigo-50/50 p-5 rounded-[5px] flex flex-col gap-4 border border-indigo-100/50\">"
args.TargetContent: "                          <div className=\"bg-indigo-50/50 p-5 rounded-[1.5rem] flex flex-col gap-4 border border-indigo-100/50\">"
args.toolAction: "Changing info box corners to 5px in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
